items.definition_en: Pruning shears are scissors used to cut small branches and stems.
items.example_en: She used the pruning shears to trim the rose bushes.

items.definition_en: A garden fork is a tool with pointed prongs for digging and turning soil.
items.example_en: He loosened the soil with the garden fork before planting.

items.definition_en: A wheelbarrow is a small cart with one wheel used for carrying materials.
items.example_en: We filled the wheelbarrow with leaves from the yard.

items.definition_en: A watering can is a container with a handle and spout for pouring water on plants.
items.example_en: I watered the flowers using the watering can.

items.definition_en: A spade is a tool with a flat blade used for digging soil.
items.example_en: She used a spade to dig a hole for the new tree.

items.definition_en: A rake is a tool with a long handle and tines for collecting leaves or smoothing dirt.
items.example_en: He gathered the fallen leaves with a rake.

items.definition_en: A trowel is a small hand tool used for planting and moving soil.
items.example_en: She planted herbs in pots using a trowel.

items.definition_en: A hoe is a tool with a flat blade for breaking up soil and removing weeds.
items.example_en: The gardener used a hoe to clear the weeds from the bed.

items.definition_en: A lawnmower is a machine used for cutting grass.
items.example_en: He pushed the lawnmower across the yard to cut the grass.

items.definition_en: A composter is a container used to turn organic waste into compost.
items.example_en: They put vegetable scraps into the composter to make fertilizer.

items.definition_en: An edger is a tool for making clean lines along garden beds and paths.
items.example_en: He used an edger to create a neat border along the lawn.

items.definition_en: A mulcher is a machine that chops up garden waste into small pieces.
items.example_en: They put branches in the mulcher to create mulch for the beds.

items.definition_en: A dibber is a pointed tool for making holes in soil to plant seeds or bulbs.
items.example_en: She used a dibber to plant the tulip bulbs evenly.

items.definition_en: A plant marker is a label used to identify plants in a garden.
items.example_en: She wrote the names of the herbs on each plant marker.

items.definition_en: A weed puller is a tool for removing weeds from the soil by the roots.
items.example_en: He used a weed puller to remove dandelions from the lawn.

items.definition_en: A garden sieve is a mesh tool for sifting soil to remove stones and debris.
items.example_en: She sifted the compost with a garden sieve before spreading it.

items.definition_en: A sprinkler is a device that sprays water evenly across a lawn or garden.
items.example_en: They set up the sprinkler to water the vegetable garden.

items.definition_en: A cultivator is a tool for loosening soil and mixing compost into garden beds.
items.example_en: He used the cultivator to prepare the garden for planting.

items.definition_en: Garden twine is strong string used to tie or support plants.
items.example_en: She tied the tomato plants to stakes with garden twine.

items.definition_en: A shrub rake is a small rake used for cleaning around bushes and in tight spaces.
items.example_en: He cleared the leaves from under the hedge with a shrub rake.
